name: Scale Kid Run And Jump Up
description: Scale Kid Run And Jump Up is an endless adventure, immersing players in a vibrant world of constant challenges. As Scale Man, players embark on a journey requiring precision and agility. Scale Man&rsquo;s unique power is size adjustment, allowing players to overcome obstacles and navigate tight spaces. The game features numerous obstacles and puzzles, requiring clever size adjustments and quick thinking. Boosters like speed boosts and shields aid Scale Man in the relentless run, enhancing gameplay. Customizable skins also add to the unique experience. Website Developer <a href='https://www.crazygamesx.com/'>https://www.crazygamesx.com/</a>
instructions: Mouse click and look around SPACE to jump WASD to walk
tags: Action, Boys, Kids, Mentolatux, Unity3D, WebGL
